titleStmt.title: SII 18.200: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 200. (B.K. No. 181 of 1933-34.) KUMAṬHE, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 2nd year of the reign of Siṁgaṇadēva, Raudri, Vaiśākhaba. Amāvāsyā, Monday, solar eclipse. The date is irregular. In Raudri, corresponding to A.D. 1200, Vais11ākha amāvāsyā did not fall on Monday nor was there a solar eclipse in that year. The tithi given corresponds to A.D. 1200, May 14, Sunday.
It registers a gift of land to god Kannēśvaradēva of Kumbiṭage by Kanniseṭṭi, after purchasing it from Kūcharasa, the Mahāprabhu of Arjunige.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)mū
lastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrīmatu
yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakra
vartti siṁgaṇadēvavarṣada yaraḍaneya raudri
saṁvachsa(tsa)rada vaiśākha bahuḷa Amāvāse
sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇa nimitta
vāgi tarddavāḍi sāyirada śrīmadagra
hāra goṭṭeya praviṣṭa kuṁbiṭageya śrī
kaṁnēsvaradēvargge kaṁniseṭṭiyaru Arjjuni
geya mahāprabhu kūcarasaṁ
gaḷa kayyalu Alliya mūligara stānamā
nyada saṁnidhānadalu taṁma Arjjunigeya ba
ḍagaṇa holanoḷage śrīsōmanāthadēva
ra keyiṁ teṁkalu taddalabāgeya sīmeyi
ṁ mūḍalu yiṁnesa hasigeyāgi beṁ
koḷvana kōlalu mattaru 5 maṁ māṟugoṁḍu
sarvvanamasyavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ mā
ḍi koṭṭaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 18.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
